Resources and canvases: Business Impact Canvas, Locations Canvas, Capacity Canvas, Domain Canvas, Interaction Canvas, Customer Journey Canvas, Capability Value Proposition Canvas, Capability Business Model Canvas, REST Canvas, Event Canvas, GraphQL Canvas, API Value Proposition Canvas, API Business Model Canvas

Help the team use the recommended APIOps Cycles resources. For canvases, ask for evidence section by section and propose sticky notes. For checklists or guidelines, summarize what to review, what evidence is missing, and who should answer.
